title: Monitoring: NetFlow Monitor Apply, IP SLA ICMP Echo (60s), SPAN Session 5
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: Enable Flexible NetFlow on R1 E0/0 in both directions using the pre-configured flow monitor.
Configure a basic IP SLA ICMP echo operation on R1 to ping Sw1's Loopback interface every 60 seconds.
Configure the switch port analyzer on Sw1 using these settings: Session number 5 • Mirror all traffic on E0/2 • Direct output to interface E1/0.

required.line: ip sla schedule 10 life forever start-time now
monitor session 5 source interface Ethernet0/2 both

hints: R1'de 'show run | sec sla' ile SLA ID'nin 10 olup olmadığını doğrula; farklıysa gerçek ID'yi kullan.
Sw1'de 'show ip int brief' ile Loopback IP'sinin 5.5.5.5 olup olmadığını doğrula; farklıysa gerçek IP'yi kullan.
R1'de 'show flow monitor' ile monitor adının Monitor-FlowR1 olup olmadığını doğrula; farklıysa gerçek adı kullan.
answer_key_raw:
R1:
R1> enable
R1# configure terminal
R1(config)# ip sla 10
R1(config-ip-sla)# icmp-echo 5.5.5.5
R1(config-ip-sla-echo)# frequency 60
R1(config-ip-sla-echo)# exit
R1(config)# ip sla schedule 10 life forever start-time now
R1(config)# interface Ethernet0/0
R1(config-if)# ip flow monitor Monitor-FlowR1 input
R1(config-if)# ip flow monitor Monitor-FlowR1 output
R1(config-if)# end
R1# write

Sw1:
Sw1> enable
Sw1# configure terminal
Sw1(config)# monitor session 5 source interface e0/2 both
Sw1(config)# monitor session 5 destination interface e1/0
Sw1(config)# end
Sw1# write
explanation: Önceden tanımlı flow monitor, interface altında input ve output yönlerinde ayrı ayrı uygulanır. IP SLA ICMP echo hedefi Sw1'in Loopback IP'sidir (5.5.5.5) ve frequency 60 saniyedir; schedule edilmeden operasyon başlamaz. SPAN'de E0/2'deki tüm trafik (both) session 5 ile E1/0'a aynalanır.
